title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey! Is she coming or what?!
choice_data_list: I'm sure she'll be here any moment...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but I've already wasted over twenty
minutes waiting around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion has been looking forward to this
opportunity to run with Air Shakur, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's it. I'm outta he—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I see it, it's always so
fun watching the two of you interact.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Before you start with the mindless babble,
don't you have something more important to say?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! Here, these are for the two of
you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is this a... four-leaf clover?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Indeed it is! I spotted a patch of white clovers on
my way over here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I thought that perhaps I might find some four-leaf
clovers, and lo and behold!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, am I really that tardy?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, I'm outta here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry! It's just that I had a flash of inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've been searching for a suitable present for the
two of you for so long!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? What the hell for?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why, because I've caused so much trouble for
you, of course.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I'm aware of things that would
absolutely make each of you happy, but
something felt... off.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why I decided to give you something
important to me instead—something that contains
my feelings.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Can you forgive me?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I take it you're still mad, then?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Can it! Just hurry up and come to the starting line!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right! Coming!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll see you later! ♪
